name: HANSON, EXECUTRIX, et al. v. DENCKLA et al.
question_presented: Memorization-check set: predict the Supreme Court's disposition in HANSON, EXECUTRIX, et al. v. DENCKLA et al. (357 U.S. 235, 1957 Term).
facts_summary: Historical case in the memorization-check arm. By design, only the case name, citation, and term are provided — this arm measures recall of memorized outcomes, not reasoning.
